page_metadata.biotools__summary: ECMPride is a flexible and scalable tool for predicting extracellular matrix (ECM) proteins. ECMPride can directly perform ECM prediction by taking UniProt IDs in CSV file format as input.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ECMPride is a flexible and scalable tool for predicting extracellular matrix (ECM) proteins. ECMPride can directly perform ECM prediction by taking UniProt IDs in CSV file format as input.
